response:
Subject: Follow-up regarding camera specifications

Dear Mr. [Recipient Name],

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision setup. Our device is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, which utilizes a Sony IMX172 image sensor, not an e2V sensor.

I have attached the technical data to this email for your reference:
*   Please refer to page 18 of the "FL3-U3-Technical-Reference" PDF for the detailed datasheet.
*   For Quantum Efficiency details, please see page 13 of the "FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging" PDF.

I will review the files and manuals more carefully and get back to you with further information.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
